description_long: This is a long, traditional wooden bench with a high, flat backrest and solid side panels, reminiscent of those found in churches or public waiting areas. The bench is constructed from dark-stained wood, giving it a classic and sturdy appearance. The seat is wide and flat, designed to accommodate multiple people, while the backrest extends the full length of the bench for support. The side panels are thick and feature stepped detailing at the base, adding both stability and a touch of decorative craftsmanship. The rear of the bench is plain, with the wood grain visible, and the overall structure is robust and heavy. This bench is suitable for communal seating in parks, public buildings, or transit stations.
description: A long, dark wooden bench with a high backrest and solid, decorative side panels, designed for communal seating. Its classic, sturdy build makes it ideal for public or indoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the bench, the high backrest, and the wide seat.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, stepped side panel and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wooden back and the solid construction of the bench.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the stepped side panel and overall depth.
attribute_leg_design: solid wooden side panels with stepped base
